name: Sparkle Family Dental
description: A modern family and cosmetic dental practice dedicated to providing premium oral healthcare. We offer comprehensive treatments ranging from routine cleanings to advanced dental implants and cosmetic teeth whitening in a comfortable, state-of-the-art environment.

services.name: Routine Cleaning & Exam
services.description: Standard diagnostic exam, X-rays, plaque removal, and polishing. Recommended every 6 months.

services.name: Teeth Whitening
services.description: In-office professional laser teeth whitening session that brightens teeth up to 8 shades in one hour.

services.name: Composite Filling
services.description: Tooth-colored composite resin fillings to repair cavities, blending seamlessly with your natural teeth.

services.name: Emergency Dental Exam
services.description: Urgent diagnostic appointment for acute tooth pain, chips, cracks, or swelling. Treatment cost calculated separately.

services.name: Dental Implants
services.description: Permanent tooth replacement solution consisting of a titanium post and custom porcelain crown.

faqs.question: Do you accept insurance?
faqs.answer: Yes, we accept all major PPO insurance plans. We do not accept HMO plans or Medicaid at this time. Our staff will file all claims on your behalf.

faqs.question: Is there parking available?
faqs.answer: Yes, there is free validated parking available for all patients in the garage attached to the building.

faqs.question: What should I bring to my first visit?
faqs.answer: Please bring a valid photo ID, your dental insurance card, and a list of any current medications you are taking.

faqs.question: Do you treat children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we are a family-friendly practice and treat pediatric patients starting at age 2.

rules: Appointments must be scheduled at least 2 hours in advance.
The receptionist must collect the caller's full name, phone number, and preferred date and time.
The receptionist must verify which service is being requested.
Do not confirm availability for specific slots without checking; check with the customer first and assume default openings exist unless they request off-hours.
booking.cancellationPolicy: We require at least 24 hours notice for any appointment cancellations or rescheduling. Cancellations with less than 24 hours notice may be subject to a $50 fee.
